title: Better Than Weather
description: A BTA port of BetterWeather that transforms the weather in your world to be localized with volumetric clouds.
body:
# Better than Weather
**A port of the mod [BetterWeather](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterweather) but with some new features and BTA compatibilities!**

> ### What does this mod include?
- Volumetric clouds!
- Different cloud/weather patterns per season!
- Custom rain (built to look exact like Minecraft's)
- Shifting wind speeds and directions
- Loads of new options!
- Rain drifts (Go to High Quality Settings to see them!)
- Dynamic fog!
- Even Hell and Endless Winter get their own custom weather :)
- Ummm yeah that's about it I guess


The mod is still in development but I think its time to publish the first version. :)
_Please save the mod in your bookmarks and check up on it every so often because I will fix things_
